user_task_description: This workbook contains one obsolete sheet that should no longer be present in the deliverable.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Delete the worksheet named `Archive_2024_DO_NOT_USE` and leave the rest of the workbook unchanged.
atomic_scope: Only sheet deletion is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised .xlsx workbook with the obsolete sheet removed.

inspired_by.title: Excel is not saving multiple sheets

notes.Why This Variant Is Hard:
- The workbook contains multiple tabs and one of them looks plausibly useful unless the name is read carefully
- The instruction is structural, not content-based
- Nothing else in the workbook should be renamed or edited
